column1: Fri, 26 Oct 2001 10:18:21 -0700 (PDT),todd.richards@enron.com,mary.fischer@enron.com,CPA Exam Vacation/Comp Days,"Mary,  I apologize for the late notice on this, but here are the days I am planning to be out for the CPA Exam:
